summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Benevolence Mode feature for TrustOffice app. All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including conditional sidebar navigation, settings toggle, benevolence page, and templates gallery.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended but not blocking

backend_api: GET /api/template-options includes benevolence_approval when trust has benevolence enabled
GET /api/template-options excludes benevolence_approval when trust has benevolence disabled
GET /api/benevolence returns records for enabled trust
POST /api/benevolence fails with 400 when benevolence is not enabled
frontend_ui: Benevolence nav link visible in sidebar when benevolence_enabled=true
Benevolence nav link hidden in sidebar when benevolence_enabled=false
Settings page shows Benevolence Mode toggle with correct state
Tax status dropdown appears when benevolence is enabled
Tax status dropdown hidden when benevolence is disabled
Benevolence page loads with title 'Benevolence Log'
Benevolence page shows summary cards (Total Grants, Total Amount, This Year, Categories)
Record Grant dialog has all required form fields
Minutes Templates gallery shows 'Benevolence Assistance' template when enabled
Benevolence template form page loads with correct title
Benevolence template form has all required fields (Beneficiary Name, Amount, Purpose, etc.)
Auto-add to Benevolence Log checkbox is present and checked by default

critical_code_review_comments: Minor accessibility improvement: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for screen reader support
seed_data_creation: Used 'Use Demo Data' button to create Smith Family Trust with benevolence_enabled=true. Existing benevolence record: John Smith - $1,500 Medical Expenses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Benevolence Mode feature is fully functional. The trust 'Smith Family Trust' (trust_f8896488ce03) has benevolence_enabled=true and one benevolence record exists. The feature includes: 1) Benevolence toggle in Settings page with tax_status dropdown, 2) Conditional Benevolence nav link in sidebar, 3) Benevolence Log page with CRUD operations, summary cards, and filters, 4) Benevolence Approval template in Minutes Templates gallery.
